feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Need help! How to set ETag for a PATCH request with OData V2 Remote Client Proxy
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Good Day!

Currently I'm developing a feature in SAP BTP ABAP environment, which will communicate with our SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud system through API (remote OData) to update Product Master Data.

Precisely, I'm trying to update Change Master header data through this API. I'm using OData remote client proxy with Service Consumption Model and call to a PATCH request to achieve the desired outcome.

Now the thing is, when I execute the request, it said If-Match is missing. So I try to handle this by first calling a GET request to the same Entity (with same key), then get the ETag from the response header.

After that I add the ETag as the If-Match value and call the PATCH request again. But this time the response is "If-Match is requested but no ETag property was found" and it ends up with error.

I tried multiple ways, like using HTTP client only, or change the format of the ETag value. But none of them really helps.

I'll put the source code I used below for more details.

 

 

    DATA lo_resource      TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_resource_entity.
    DATA lo_request       TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_update.
    DATA lo_read_request  TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_read.
    DATA ls_patch_req_busi_data TYPE ty_patch_request_data.
    DATA ls_read_data TYPE ty_read_data.

    IF mo_client_proxy IS INITIAL.
*      mo_client_proxy = get_client_proxy( ).
      " Create http client
      DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
                                                   comm_scenario  = '<my_communication_scenario>'
                                                   comm_system_id = '<my_communication_system>'
                                                   service_id     = '<my_service_id>' ).
      DATA(lo_http_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).

      mo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(
                            is_proxy_model_key       = VALUE #( repository_id       = 'DEFAULT'
                                                                proxy_model_id      = gc_proxy_model_id-cma
                                                                proxy_model_version = '0001' )
                            io_http_client           = lo_http_client
                            iv_relative_service_root = '' ).
    ENDIF.

    " Navigate to the resource and create a request for the update operation
    lo_resource = mo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set(
                    'A_CHANGE_MASTER' )->navigate_with_key( ms_entity_key ).

    " Get Etag
    lo_read_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_read( ).
    DATA(lo_read_response) = lo_read_request->execute( ).
    DATA(lv_etag) = lo_read_response->get_etag( ).

    lo_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_update( /iwbep/if_cp_request_update=>gcs_update_semantic-patch ).

    lo_request->set_if_match(   " <--- Error will be raised at this step
      EXPORTING
        iv_etag = lv_etag    " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"{ lv_etag }"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/'{ lv_etag }'|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"'{ lv_etag }'"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = '*'                 " Not working
    ).

    ls_patch_req_busi_data = CORRESPONDING #( ms_business_data ).
    lo_request->set_business_data(
      EXPORTING
        is_business_data            = ls_patch_req_busi_data
        it_provided_property        = me->get_entity_properties( ls_patch_req_busi_data ) ).

    " Execute the request
    lo_request->execute( ).

I really needs help for this point, maybe I messed up something in between? Hopefully someone can show me the way.

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Cannot POST GOODS ISSUE OF OUTBOUND DELIVERY 81010270
entry.content:
We are unable to PGI ODO 81010270

Please process related que in warehouse monitor

entry.title: Query List of Outbound Deliveries based on CreationDate and Time
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need to integrate the outbound delivery information with an external application using the SAP Integration Suite from S4 Hana Public Cloud.

We plan to use the standard SAP-provided communication scenario "SAP_COM_0106" and the "Outbound Delivery(A2X) Odata V2 API (https://api.sap.com/api/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002/overview) endpoint to read the outbound deliveries list based on the creation date and Time.

I am trying to create the endpoint as below and using it in Postman to see the list of deliveries created

 

https://myXXXXXX.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;v=0002/A_OutbDeliveryHeader?$filter=CreationDate ge datetime '2024-12-18T00:00:00' and CreationTime ge time'23:59:00'&$top=50

Using the basic authentication to get this list using POSTMAN

This is failing and resulting in a Bad Request. I am not sure how I can get my list of outbound deliveries from S4 Public Cloud. I am struggling hard here to make this query work or if this is not the right one to do then I would like to know a way to query and get the list of outbound deliveries created in S4.

Please suggest ways or support here guiding to get this list.

 

Appreciate any help and suggestions.

Thanks,

Hanu K

entry.title: Query List of Otbound Deliveries from SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud using APIs
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need to integrate the outbound delivery information with an external application using the SAP Integration Suite from S4 Hana Public Cloud.

We plan to use the standard SAP-provided communication scenario "SAP_COM_0106" and the "Outbound Delivery(A2X) Odata V2 API (https://api.sap.com/api/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002/overview) endpoint to read the outbound deliveries list based on the creation date and Time.

I am trying to create the endpoint as below and using it in Postman to see the list of deliveries created

 

HTTPS://myXXXXXX.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;v=0002/A_OutbDeliveryHeader?$filter=CreationDate ge datetime '2024-12-18T00:00:00' and CreationTime ge time'23:59:00'&$top=50

Using the basic authentication to get this list using POSTMAN

This is failing and resulting in a Bad Request. I am not sure how I can get my list of outbound deliveries from S4 Public Cloud. I am struggling hard here to make this query work or if this is not the right one to do then I would like to know a way to query and get the list of outbound deliveries created in S4.

Please suggest ways or support here guiding to get this list.

 

Appreciate any help and suggestions.

Thanks,

Hanu K

entry.title: How to deal with the inconsistency between the unit of the sample and the basic unit of the material
entry.content: For example: The basic unit of material is ton, and 500g is fixed for sampling, which needs to be consumed. How to operate it.

entry.title: Business Architect Responsibilities for an SAP S/4 Hana Cloud project
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are starting an SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Greenfield project. In order to manage the scope and the time well, what are the meetings, platforms and strategy points that an SAP Business Architect can plan and execute in the explore and design phases?

Your suggestions will help us a lot in planning our project for success from the beginning itself. Thank you in advance.

Best,

PP

entry.title: SAP CLOUD PUBLIC advances catalog effectively used
entry.content:
Hello,
I have users who have roles with advanced price catagory, but I would like to know if they really use the catalogs who have advanced price catagory.
Do we have a report in SAP PUBLIC CLOUD that show that ?
Thank you for any help on tis matter !
Christophe

entry.title: OData V2 Fiori Elements extension button, property Enabled doesn't work
entry.content:
Dear,


I use OData V2 to generate Fiori Elements reports and extend some buttons. However, when I enable or disable these buttons, the code does not work. I want to know if UI5 itself does not allow this solution.


See the attachment. The following two methods do not work.
1. Configure in manifest.json
2. Use JS code control


Thanks & Best PERSON_NAME.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Field in My Inbox Purchase Order Screen.
entry.content:
We are using the standard "My Inbox" Fiori application for managing purchase orders in SAP S/4HANA.

 

We have created a custom field that has been successfully added to the screen layout of the purchase order.

 

How can this custom field be displayed in My Inbox detail section ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mass changes in BOM items – (Changing the item quantity or delete the item) in S/4HANA CLoud ?
entry.content:
We have a client requirement for changing the BOM item quantity and mass deleting the item in the BOM in S/4HANA cloud.

As per checking, we can able to replace the BOM item in mass in 'Material Where-Used List in BOMs’ but we are unable change only quantity in mass also unable to
delete the item in mass.

Please suggest us to fulfil the requirement.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Activate Tax Number Category Duplication Check for Business Partners
entry.content:
How to Configure Required filed value check logic of the Tax number in Business partner?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Make custom field clickable and redirect to another app
entry.content:
In S/4 HANA Public Cloud, I would like to add a custom field in the Journal Entry Item which is a reclass of an accounting document. But I would like it to be a clickable field which redirects it to Manage Journal Entries App or any other app related to the Journal Entries.

Is this possible?

entry.title: Unable to call subsequent SOAP API in S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
In S/4 HANA Public Cloud, I'm trying to call two consecutive SOAP API - one is to Post Journal Entry (for reclass) while the other is to update a custom field of the original Journal Entry.

First API (post) works as expected. However, the second API (change) does not work. It seems that in method CL_WS_PROXY_RUNTIME_OUTBOUND->EXECUTE, the attribute M_REQUEST_URI still contain the URI of the first API (post) hence causing error.

I tried to look for some class to reset the attribute but they are all not permitted to be used. 

Any ideas on how to make this work?

entry.title: Service Master Template Price Column in Sap S/4Hana Public Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Hi Sapians,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, the service master template includes a column for price control, where the price type can be set as either "S" (Standard) or "V" (Moving Average). However, there is no column in the template for entering the standard price/moving price. On the other hand, if we use transaction MM01 to create a service, there is a field to enter the standard price, but no field for selecting the price control type.

 

This raises a question: if the standard price for a service is not maintained in the same way as it is in ECC or the on-premise version, why does the template include a price control column? Conversely, if the standard price functionality is indeed available in this edition, why isn’t there a column for entering the standard price in the service master template?

Thanks

entry.title: PARTIAL PAYEMENT WITH F110 on SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi

Can someone tell me how to carry out the PARTIAL PAYEMENT WITH F110 on SAP PUBLIC CLOUD.

Thanks

entry.title: Sap public cloud - PIRS
entry.content:
Only one plant is fixed in maintain pir.
Other plants are not searched.
Where do I set the default settings?
I want to search other plants as well.

entry.title: How to Configure Limit Attachment file Size in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Dear All,

How to setting for limit attachment file size in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, example i want upload document PR/PO but i want to limit file size for the document . Because in user profile setting, there no option for limit attachment file. Can anyone help me for this issue?

Regards,

entry.title: Rental condition type should auto calculate the unit price in the manage contract app.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement in RE FX lease accounting, where the rental condition type should auto calculate the unit price in the manage contract app.

Current standard process:

When we insert the condition type in the “Manage Contract” app, rental condition will be added, and unit price is updated manually in the section as per below screen shot.

 

Selecting the relevant condition from the list:

When we add the condition, the unit price will show as 0 as per the standard functionality.

We enter the condition amount manually in the unit price section.

 

As per our requirement for the automate calculation based on the condition type and company code combination: The Unit Price needs to be calculated automatically based on a formula...

X represents Turbine rent

A represents No. of Wind Turbines (value of 6)

B represents MW capacity of Wind Turbines (value of 20,0000)

X will be calculated as follows (A x B = X)

6 x 20,000 = 120,000

So, X (Turbine rent) will have an automatic calculated value of 120,000.

Please let us know, what is the best way to achieve this requirement. 

your prompt response would be highly appreciated 😊

Thanks,

Karthik

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP Real Estate Management

entry.title: Open new Fiscal year
entry.content: In the SAP S/4HANA public cloud version, is the opening of a new fiscal year automatic? Is the opening of a new fiscal year for Fixed Assets (FA) also automatic? I seem to be unable to find anything to check.

entry.title: How to Change Date Formats in Custom CDS Views in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Problem Statement:
In the Custom CDS View app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, there are scenarios where a report requires a column with date values to be displayed in a specific format based on business needs. However, the app does not provide a direct function to change the date format. To address this, you can leverage a calculated column and utilize predefined functions such as CONCAT and SUBSTRING. By using these functions, you can manipulate the date values into the desired format.
I will demonstrate how to achieve this using an example to address such requirements effectively.

Solution:

Scenario:
Suppose there is a column in a standard CDS view containing date values in the MM/DD/YYYY format (Figure 1.1), but you need the date to be displayed in the DD-MM-YYYY format in your report.


Fig 1.1

Solution:
Step 1: Create a calculative column in a custom CDS.




Step 2: Copy the below code and paste in the code space and click on Apply.

concat( substring( I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 7 , 2 ) , concat( '-' , concat( substring(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 5 , 2 ),concat( '-' , substring( I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 1 , 4 ) ) )))



Explanation of code :

The SUBSTRING function used to extracts specific parts of the string based on the start position and length.
The CONCAT function is used to combine two or more strings into a single string.

SUBSTRING(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 7, 2) extracts the day (characters 7 and 2 as 7 is start position and 2 is the length.

SUBSTRING(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 5, 2) extracts the month (characters 5 and 6) as 5 is start position and 2 is the length.

SUBSTRING(I_BillingDocument.BillingDocumentDate, 1, 4) extracts the year (characters 1 through 4) as 1 is start position and 4 is the length.

The CONCAT function combines these extracted parts and inserts the '-' character as a separator between them.

Step 3: Click on Check, and once the check is complete, click on Data Browser.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
